allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: initial commit - Iarubá functional audio mixer

Iarubá is a modern, functional reimplementation of hardware-based 
audio control with a beautiful GUI for Linux.

Features:
- Functional Haskell architecture with pure core
- PulseAudio/PipeWire integration (scaffolded)
- GTK+ 3 GUI framework (scaffolded)
- Arduino serial communication (firmware ready)
- YAML-based configuration with validation
- Profile management system
- Task management system
- Comprehensive documentation

Structure:
- 23 Haskell modules organized by domain
- Complete build system (Stack + GHC 9.6.6)
- CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
- Arduino firmware for 5-slider mixer
- Example configurations and profiles

Documentation:
- CLAUDE.md: Architecture guide for AI assistants
- README.md: User documentation
- CONTRIBUTING.md: Contribution guidelines
- QUICKSTART.md: 5-minute setup guide
- Hardware setup guide

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
